summary:
Claim: Endothelial cells are the primary source of von Willebrand factor (vWF) secretion.  
Evidence: - vWF is synthesized and released primarily by endothelial cells lining blood vessels. - Platelets do not produce vWF; they only capture and concentrate it after endothelial release.  
Answer: B

Answer: B. Answer choice: B
